name: Gapless Player
description: Gapless Web Audio playback for eligible audio queues in the web client. The stock HTML audio player remains the fallback.
overview: Gapless Web Audio playback for eligible audio queues.

versions.changelog: Gapless Web Audio playback for eligible audio queues. Injects into the stock web client in-memory (no web-root writes); now-playing-bar on/off toggle; repeat and shuffle; graceful fallback to the normal player for undecodable tracks; strips leading ID3 tags so tagged FLAC decodes gaplessly.
